name: opennort
description: Schema-gated adversarial research workflow for Codex.

interface.longDescription: OpenNort packages a deterministic, evidence-gated, multi-agent research workflow as a Codex extension. It provides a schema-validated skill, retained subagent records, source hashing, and a completion gate for research, review, and experiment-planning work.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenNort Run 1 to produce an evidence-backed plan.
Use OpenNort Run 2 to execute the approved plan.
Audit this repo with OpenNort's adversarial workflow.
